compare.shiftHint: Shift targets the right compare pane.

navigation.loadingAnnounce: Page navigation is still loading pages.
navigation.noPagesAnnounce: No visible pages are currently available.

toolbar.printDisabledLoading: Printing becomes available when all pages are fully loaded.

printDialog.title: Print
printDialog.desc: Choose what to print. The default option is {active}.
printDialog.headerNote: A print header will be added according to system configuration. It cannot be disabled here.

range.allowedHint: Allowed range: 1–{total}. You can print ascending or descending ranges.

custom.hint: Separate with spaces or commas. Ranges can be ascending or descending.
custom.label: Pages

errors.enterExtra: Please enter additional details for the selected reason.
errors.extraFormat: Additional text format is not allowed.
errors.enterAtLeastOne: Enter at least one page or range.

printDialog.summary: You will print {count, plural, =1 {# page} other {# pages}}.
printDialog.loadingHint: More print options become available when all pages have finished loading. For now, only the active page can be printed.

allScope.label: What should “All pages” include?
allScope.hint: Choose whether printing should follow the current selection or ignore the selection and print the full session.

activeScope.label: What should “Active page” mean in compare view?
activeScope.hint: When compare mode is active, current-page printing can include only the left page or both pages shown side by side.

printDialog.subtitle: Choose what to print and how this print job should be described. Current mode: {mode}.
printDialog.subtitleUnified: Choose a print method and review the print details before the browser prepares the preview.
printDialog.summaryActiveOnly: Only the active page ({page}) is currently available for printing.
printDialog.summaryCustom: Prepare the pages listed in the Pages field under Pages and scope.
printDialog.allPagesValue: All {count} session pages will be prepared.

preparing.title: Preparing print job
preparing.body: A print request for {count} pages has been sent to the browser. It can take a moment before the browser print preview opens.

loadingMessage.loadingText: Please wait, pages are still loading.
loadingMessage.errorText: Error: The document is corrupted, missing, or in an unsupported format.

loadPressure.title: Large document batch detected
loadPressure.descriptionPreload: This loading run contains many source files. OpenDocViewer can prefetch them into temporary browser storage and render pages lazily, but the operation can still consume substantial memory, CPU, and local disk resources.
loadPressure.descriptionAnalysis: The loading run is larger than expected after analyzing the prefetched files. You can stop now and retry with a smaller batch or continue at your own risk.
loadPressure.recommendStop: Recommendation: stop loading and retry with fewer files or lower concurrency if possible.
loadPressure.continueNote: Continuing is usually acceptable for moderate runs, but the browser may still become slow on very large batches.
loadPressure.stoppedMessage: Loading was stopped before the remaining pages were analyzed.

selectionEmpty.title: No pages remain in the current selection
selectionEmpty.description: The active selection currently hides every page. Reset the selection filter to show the full session again, or open the selection tab to choose a new subset.

thumbnails.goToPageBothPanes: Go to page {page} (shown in both panes)

controls.minimumWidth: Set thumbnail pane to minimum width
controls.resetWidth: Reset thumbnail pane to default width
controls.maximumWidth: Set thumbnail pane to maximum width

metrics.documentPageBadgeTitle: Page number within the current document
metrics.totalPageBadgeTitle: Visible page number in the current selection

selection.loadingStatus: Selection becomes available when all pages are fully loaded ({ready}/{total} ready, {pending} remaining).
selection.loadingStatusShort: Selection will be available when all pages are fully loaded.
selection.clearFilter: Clear the selection filter and show all pages

contextMenu.hidePageFromSelection: Hide this page from the current selection
contextMenu.hidePageUnavailable: At least one visible page must remain selected.
contextMenu.hideDocumentFromSelection: Hide the entire document from the current selection
contextMenu.hideUnavailable: Selection tools become available when all pages are fully loaded.
contextMenu.showToRight: Show this page in the right compare pane
contextMenu.openCompareFromThumbnail: Open compare view and show this page on the right

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.generic: The application encountered an unexpected error.

noscript.title: JavaScript is disabled
noscript.message: You need to enable JavaScript to run this app. Please enable JavaScript in your browser settings and refresh this page.

help.title: OpenDocViewer help
help.subtitle: A short guide to navigation, comparison, thumbnails, selection, image adjustments, and printing.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.intro: Use the toolbar, Arrow Up/Arrow Down, Home, and End to move through the material.
navigation.pageMode: Normal navigation moves one page at a time.
navigation.shiftMode: Hold Shift to target the right compare pane. If compare mode is not open yet, Shift + navigation opens it on the right.
navigation.ctrlMode: Hold Ctrl when more than one document is loaded to move document by document instead of page by page.
navigation.ctrlShiftMode: Hold Ctrl + Shift in compare mode to navigate whole documents in the right pane.

compare.title: Compare mode
compare.body: Compare mode shows two pages side by side. The left page is the primary page and the right page is the compare page.

thumbnails.title: Thumbnails and document grouping
thumbnails.body: The thumbnail pane shows document boundaries and page metadata. T shows the visible page number in the current selection. D shows the document number. S shows the page number inside that document.
thumbnails.boundaries: The sticky document label at the top of the thumbnail pane follows your current position in the list.
thumbnails.contextMenu: Right-click a thumbnail to show that page on the right compare pane, or to hide the page/document from the active selection. Right-click the large right pane to close compare mode.

selection.title: Selection
selection.body: The Selection tab lets you include or exclude whole documents or individual pages. Save applies the filter. Cancel restores the last saved selection.
selection.empty: If the saved selection hides everything, the viewer shows an empty-selection message with actions to restore the full session or reopen the Selection tab.
selection.collapse: Each document can be expanded or collapsed in the Selection tab so large sessions remain easier to manage.
selection.shortcut: Press Delete to hide the current left/main page from the saved selection. Hold Shift in compare mode to hide the right page instead.

adjustments.title: Image adjustments
adjustments.body: Rotation, brightness, contrast, and reset are always available in the toolbar. Brightness and contrast open from their icons. The viewer keeps using fast image rendering until you actually apply a real adjustment. Only then does that pane switch to canvas rendering.
adjustments.primary: Without Shift, adjustments target the left/primary page.
adjustments.compare: With Shift in compare mode, adjustments target the right page.
adjustments.reset: Adjustments reset when you move to another page.
adjustments.shortcut: Use Arrow Left and Arrow Right to rotate the active pane. Hold Shift in compare mode to rotate the right pane instead.

printing.title: Printing
printing.body: Open the print dialog from the toolbar. Choose a print method from the list, then review the print details before the browser prepares the preview.
printing.selection: If a saved selection hides pages, “All pages” can use either the current selection or the full session.

shortcuts.title: Close dialogs
shortcuts.body: Press Escape to close the print dialog or this help overlay.
